chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-1547 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Directions For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 29.01.2026. Mr. Saad Fayaz, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, Advocate for Respondent No.1. Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, A.A.G. --------------- Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Petitioner and Respondent No.2 invite attention to the Order made by the learned Divisional Bench of this Court on 16.01.2025 in C.P No. D- 5792/2024 and submit that the controversy underpinning this Petition is all fours with that case. They seek disposal of this Petition in similar terms. So ordered. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly with the aforementioned Order to apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
